tasks.name: H_Safe pilot: Safety-critical feature absorption on Gemma Scope
tasks.description: Test H_Safe: safety-critical features show elevated absorption vs matched non-safety features. Load Gemma Scope SAEs from HuggingFace, select 20 safety-relevant features via Neuronpedia, match 20 non-safety features, measure absorption via overlap method. No training needed.

pilot.pass_criteria: Gemma Scope SAEs loaded, safety features identified, absorption scores computed for both groups

visualizations.description: Safety vs non-safety absorption rate comparison

tasks.name: H3_fix pilot: Debug and validate steering implementation
tasks.description: Fix broken steering implementation from pilot. Verify ||steered - baseline|| > 0. Test alpha scaling produces proportional changes. Use simpler test cases first. Alternative: measure logit-level steering effect (Basu et al. 2026).

pilot.pass_criteria: ||steered - baseline|| > 1e-6, absorbed vs non-absorbed show different steering response

visualizations.description: Steering effect by feature type (absorbed vs non-absorbed)

tasks.name: Multi-seed validation for H1 (address zero-variance concern)
tasks.description: Validate H1 with multiple seeds (42, 43, 44) to address zero-variance concern from pilot (std=0.0 for trained SAE). Measure multi-child proportional absorption for each seed. Expected: non-zero variance across seeds if absorption is not purely deterministic.

pilot.pass_criteria: Non-zero variance across seeds, all seeds show absorption > 0.3 for trained SAE

tasks.name: H_Mech: 2x2 factorial decomposition (geometric vs learned)
tasks.description: Decompose absorption into geometric vs learned contributions via 2x2 factorial: (A) random encoder + random decoder, (B) trained encoder + random decoder, (C) random encoder + trained decoder, (D) trained encoder + trained decoder. Expected: Condition C ≈ D ≈ 0.48, Condition A ≈ 0.06.

pilot.pass_criteria: All 4 conditions measured, Condition C ≈ D (within 0.1)

visualizations.description: 2x2 factorial decomposition: absorption by encoder/decoder type

tasks.name: H_Safe full: Extended safety-critical feature analysis
tasks.description: Extended safety analysis with more safety-relevant features (40 total) and multiple Gemma Scope layers. Include deception, jailbreak, harm, manipulation categories separately. Match non-safety controls per category.

tasks.name: Generate paper figures and summary
tasks.description: Generate all figures for paper: (1) safety vs non-safety bar chart (H_Safe), (2) steering effect bar chart (H3), (3) multi-seed box plot, (4) 2x2 factorial grouped bar chart, (5) main results summary table.

key_changes_from_prior: H_Safe pilot as top priority (highest novelty, no training needed)
H3_fix pilot to debug broken steering implementation
Multi-seed pilot to address zero-variance concern
H_Mech factorial to decompose geometric vs learned contributions
Drop H2 (archived as negative result - wrong direction)
